title: Wsreset.exe
html:
Wsreset.exe

Used to reset Windows Store settings according to its manifest file

UAC Bypass

Execute a binary or script as a high-integrity process without a UAC prompt.

wsreset.exe

During startup, wsreset.exe checks the registry value HKCU\Software\Classes\AppX82a6gwre4fdg3bt635tn5ctqjf8msdd2\Shell\open\command for the command to run. Binary will be executed as a high-integrity process without a UAC prompt being displayed to the user. — MITRE: T1548.002 — Privileges: User
